overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage beginning with first-person observation from a city bench, then transitioning to third-person exploration of a neon-lit urban street. The clip features futuristic architecture, moderate traffic with colorful vehicles, and pedestrians in a dense commercial district with construction barriers and large billboards.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a stationary first-person view from a concrete bench on a busy city sidewalk. The camera observes moderate traffic flow with colorful futuristic vehicles passing by on the multi-lane street, while pedestrians occasionally walk past. Tall buildings with vibrant neon signage rise in the background under clear midday lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with red construction barriers and elevated highway view

events.description: camera switches from first-person to third-person perspective following a character with mohawk
character walks past parked red vehicle on the street side
passing large fashion advertisement billboard on the construction wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk passing other pedestrians and observing the street traffic

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to third-person following a character with a mohawk walking along a sidewalk bordered by a tall red construction barrier on the left. The character passes various pedestrians while colorful vehicles drive by on the multi-lane street to the right. An elevated yellow highway structure is visible in the distance, and large fashion billboards appear on the construction wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk approaching intersection with storefronts

events.description: passing large Matapang Coffee advertisement billboard on the left wall
approaching street corner with commercial buildings and storefront signage

agents.ego_description: continuing walk past billboards and approaching a street corner with various pedestrians

child in yellow shirt running ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large advertisement for Matapang Coffee showing a hand holding a yellow cup

futuristic cars parked along the curb near the storefronts

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the narrowing sidewalk, passing a large coffee advertisement billboard on the construction wall. The environment becomes more commercial with storefronts and parked vehicles visible on the right. The character approaches a street corner with distinctive building signage while navigating past pedestrians including a person with green hair and a child running ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot transitions from a stationary first-person observation of a bustling city street into a third-person follow-cam through a dense commercial district. It begins from a concrete bench on a busy sidewalk, observing colorful futuristic vehicles and neon-lit skyscrapers under clear midday light. As the perspective shifts, the camera follows a character with a mohawk walking alongside a tall red construction barrier adorned with large fashion billboards. The scene then expands as the character moves past an elevated yellow highway and a coffee advertisement, with the environment becoming increasingly commercial. Finally, the path narrows toward a street corner filled with storefronts and parked vehicles, navigating through a crowd of pedestrians including a child and a person with green hair.
